faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Bulls Head?
faqs.answer: Bulls Head's residential neighborhoods with vinyl siding, older homes with gaps around windows and doors, and proximity to green spaces provide ideal overwintering sites for stink bugs. They typically invade local homes in September and October seeking warmth, becoming a nuisance throughout winter and spring.
